name: Test Admin roles can list all users
description:
Verify Admin/Adopter Admin can list all users in the system

        Endpoint: GET /api/v1/auth/users
        Expected:
        - 200 OK for Adopter Admin, Admin
        - Response contains list of users
descriptionHtml:
Verify Admin/Adopter Admin can list all users in the system

    Endpoint: GET /api/v1/auth/users
    Expected:
    - 200 OK for Adopter Admin, Admin
    - Response contains list of users
statusTrace:
self = <test_user_management.TestUserManagementRBAC object at 0x7a954dd58f70>, role_fixture = 'admin_client', role_name = 'Admin', request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users_success_admin[admin_client-Admin]>>

    @allure.story("List Users - Positive (Admin)")
    @allure.title("Test Admin roles can list all users")
    @pytest.mark.parametrize("role_fixture,role_name", [
        ("adopter_admin_client", "Adopter Admin"),
        ("admin_client", "Admin"),
    ])
    def test_list_users_success_admin(self, role_fixture, role_name, request):
        """
        Verify Admin/Adopter Admin can list all users in the system
    
        Endpoint: GET /api/v1/auth/users
        Expected:
        - 200 OK for Adopter Admin, Admin
        - Response contains list of users
        """
        client = request.getfixturevalue(role_fixture)
    
        response = client.get(settings.USER_LIST)
    
>       assert response.status_code == 200, (
            f"{role_name} should be able to list users, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Admin should be able to list users, got 403: {"detail":{"message":"You do not have permission to perform this action.","code":"AUTHORIZATION_ERROR","timestamp":1776416761.7208536,"details":null}}
E       assert 403 == 200
E        +  where 403 = <Response [403 Forbidden]>.status_code

test_api_v2/test_auth/test_user_management.py:65: AssertionError
